mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_money_history ( member_id, trx_type_cd, change_amt, balance, ref_order_no, remark, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{trxType}, #{changeAmt}, (SELECT MEAT_MONEY FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}), #{refOrderNo}, #{remark}, #{regId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT money_hist_id, member_id, trx_type_cd, change_amt, balance, ref_order_no, remark, reg_dt FROM tb_money_history WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
